Title: PDFME  has XSS via Unsanitized i18n Label Injection into innerHTML in multiVariableText propPanel
Description: The multiVariableText property panel in `@pdfme/schemas` constructs HTML via string concatenation and assigns it to `innerHTML` using unsanitized i18n label values. An attacker who can control label overrides passed through `options.labels` can inject arbitrary JavaScript that executes in the context of any user who opens the Designer and selects a multiVariableText field with no `{variables}` in its text.
